ui.title: Business Type Transactions
ui.desc: Show Several Series in the same Chart.

data.sql: SELECT 'Business Transactions' AS C_UNIT_CODE, FA_BUSI_TYPE AS CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FADA_MASTER WHERE FA_BUSI_TYPE IN ('PF','RD','POF','DD') AND C_UNIT_CODE = '{{SYS_BUSI_UNIT}}' GROUP BY FA_BUSI_TYPE ORDER BY FA_BUSI_TYPE ASC
